description: Account of building operations ca. 1200. List of expenditures, recording the daily amount of construction work lasting two weeks, of which the details for six days are preserved. The main items refer to preparation of mortar and plastering. Written in a calligraphic hand, the accounting was perhaps intended for public display. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 396 #107)
description_he: חשבון עבודות בנייה, כ-1200. רשימת הוצאות יומיות לשבועיים: עיקרן הכנת טיח וסיד.
